securityGroupEgress.description: Allow all outbound traffic by default

aws:cdk:cloudformation:props.description: GET /neighborhoods — all or single neighborhood stats
Weekly ETL placeholder — run etl.py locally for v1

aws:cdk:cloudformation:props.buildSpec:
version: "1.0"
frontend:
  phases:
    preBuild:
      commands:
        - npm ci
    build:
      commands:
        - npm run build
  artifacts:
    baseDirectory: dist
    files:
      - "**/*"
  cache:
    paths:
      - node_modules/**/*
aws:cdk:cloudformation:props.name: sf-housing-analytics
